principle: Use canonical, citable biomedical repositories first. Treat mirrors and secondary hubs as convenience layers only after provenance, license, and dataset-card review.

sources.name: Sleep-EDF Database Expanded
sources.validation_question: Does causal-closure lambda* or perturbational complexity separate Wake, REM, N1, N2, and N3 sleep stages?
success_criteria: End-to-end loader reproduces subject-level EDF plus hypnogram pairing.
Windowed metrics are finite for at least 95 percent of artifact-screened epochs.
At least one organizational persistence metric differs across sleep stages under subject-wise cross-validation.

sources.name: MIT-BIH Normal Sinus Rhythm Database
sources.validation_question: Can Phi_temporal and Phi_informational reproduce healthy physiologic complexity from RR/ECG signals?
success_criteria: WFDB loader obtains records and annotations reproducibly.
Healthy-subject complexity metrics are finite and stable under record-wise resampling.
Outputs define external healthy reference ranges rather than synthetic-only ranges.

sources.name: MIMIC-IV Waveform Database
sources.validation_question: Do Phi metrics track ICU physiologic deterioration or recovery in real multimodal waveforms?
success_criteria: Credentialing and data-use requirements are satisfied before access.
No restricted data are committed to Git.
Patient-wise splits are enforced for all validation reports.

sources.name: Genomic Data Commons TCGA Harmonized Data
sources.validation_question: Can Confluence map real tumor cohorts into reproducible Phi-like complexity signatures and disease archetypes?
success_criteria: Open harmonized files are queried reproducibly by project and data type.
Controlled-access files are used only after dbGaP/GDC authorization.
Results are split by cancer type and never presented as patient-level clinical advice.

sources.name: cBioPortal Public Cancer Genomics API
sources.validation_question: Can public study-level cancer genomics reproduce disease-panel and parameter-map signals?
success_criteria: API queries are cached with study IDs and timestamps.
Gene-panel outputs are reproducible from public studies.
All claims remain cohort-level and exploratory.

sources.name: Hugging Face biomedical EEG/ECG/time-series dataset candidates
sources.validation_question: Are there well-documented public mirrors or derived datasets suitable for fast benchmark prototyping?
success_criteria: Dataset card names primary source, license, preprocessing, and subject split policy.
Dataset license is compatible with open scientific validation.
No Hugging Face dataset is treated as canonical if an official PhysioNet/GDC/cBioPortal source exists.

do_not_commit: large derived arrays unless explicitly anonymized and documented
